maize.name: Maize
maize.summary: Maize grows best with warm weather, regular moisture, and good soil fertility.
maize.reason: Maize fits well in rainy or warm seasons and performs well in loamy or sandy soil.

rice.name: Rice
rice.summary: Rice prefers flooded or consistently moist conditions and rich soil.
rice.reason: Rice thrives in wet seasons and heavy, water-retaining soil.

wheat.name: Wheat
wheat.summary: Wheat thrives in cool seasons and well-drained soils.
wheat.reason: Wheat performs best in cool weather and well-drained soil.
